# PathLab OS — LLM Context File
# https://llmstxt.org

# PathLab OS is a clinical digital pathology laboratory management portal.
# It provides patient record management, laboratory test reporting, doctor management,
# revenue analytics, and QR-verified digital reports.

> PathLab OS is a secure, cloud-hosted digital pathology lab management system built for
> clinical laboratories. It allows lab administrators, staff, and doctors to manage
> patient records, generate verified lab reports, track revenue, and analyse lab performance.

## Core Features

- Patient management — add, search, and track patient records with full lab history
- Lab report generation — create, fill, and download PDF reports for 40+ pathology tests
- QR-verified reports — every report includes a scannable QR code for authenticity verification
- Doctor directory — manage referring doctor profiles and contact information
- Revenue analytics — track daily, monthly, and cumulative revenue with visual charts
- Role-based access — admin, staff, and guest access levels with Firebase authentication
- PWA — installable as a Progressive Web App on Android and iOS

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://healthcare-os.pages.dev/) — Landing page with product overview
- [Technology](https://healthcare-os.pages.dev/technology) — Technology and security overview
- [Solutions](https://healthcare-os.pages.dev/solutions) — Feature descriptions and use cases
- [Verify Report](https://healthcare-os.pages.dev/verify) — Public QR code report verification page

## Private Pages (authentication required)

- /dashboard — Main application dashboard
- /auth — Login and registration

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Firebase Firestore (database), Firebase Auth (authentication)
- PDF: jsPDF + html2canvas
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages

## Optional

- [robots.txt](https://healthcare-os.pages.dev/robots.txt)
- [manifest.json](https://healthcare-os.pages.dev/manifest.json)
